Container.Name: Carvey
Container.Overview: Self-hosted car maintenance dashboard for tracking vehicles, maintenance, repairs, MOTs, reminders, costs, photos, printable seller sheets, and backups.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Persistent Carvey data, including SQLite database, uploads, backups, and restore rollback files.

Config.Name: CARVEY_SESSION_SECRET
Config.Description: Required long random secret used to sign login sessions. Change this before real use.

Config.Name: CARVEY_DATA_DIR
Config.Description: Internal data directory. Do not change unless you also change the appdata path mapping.

Config.Name: CARVEY_DEBUG_EASTER_EGGS
Config.Description: Optional hidden debug easter egg controls. Keep false for normal deployments.
